package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormHookMutatesUnrelatedTables() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_hook_mutates_unrelated_tables"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Hooks that reach beyond the owning aggregate and write unrelated records."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
